widgets_values: Don't forget to select your QWEN models here.
Create new character, then click "generate preview" to see how it would look BEFORE running workflow.
Click **Download ALL** to download all models right in your comfyUI models directory. No need to restart, all loras would work right after downloading.

Set your custom poses.
You can share them in VNCCS Discord channel: https://discord.com/invite/9Dacp4wvQw

Denoise - strengh of UpScale inpaint (more value - more changes)

Re select bbox model if you use linux
Resolution of generation (more is better but longer to gennerate)

Model (Better model - more vram needed)

Resolution of Upscaled image (more - more VRAM used)

Tolerance: strength of removing main background color. (more tolerance - less bg leftovers but higher chance that some parts of image can be damaged.

Despill - outline around the character.

Strength - use 1

Kernel size - stroke thickness in pixels

Color - black or try to match character colors
